рҹҺҜ рқ—Ёрқ—Ұрқ—ҳ рқ—–рқ—”рқ—Ұрқ—ҳ: Finding the original source or similar instances of an image by leveraging a wide array of reverse image search engines.
рҹ“… Created: Jan 2020 вҖў Updated: Feb 2026

вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§

вңЁ рқ—һрқ—ҳрқ—¬ рқ—ҷрқ—ҳрқ—”рқ—§рқ—Ёрқ—Ҙрқ—ҳрқ—Ұ вңЁ

вң… Supports multiple reverse image search engines (SauceNao, IQDB, Ascii2D, trace.moe, Google Images, TinEye, Yandex, Bing, etc.)
вң… Provides both a Windows GUI and a cross-platform Rdx command-line tool
вң… Allows searching via direct image links or files
вң… Configurable search behavior and output
вң… Context menu integration for Windows GUI

рҹ“Ҡ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§ рқ—Ұрқ—§рқ—”рқ—§рқ—Ұ

вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ 951 рқҳҖрқҳҒрқ—®рқ—ҝрқҳҖ
рҹҚҙ 49 рқ—ірқ—јрқ—ҝрқ—ёрқҳҖ
рҹ”Қ 4 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§вң§

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

SmartImage is a C# application that performs reverse image searches across multiple engines. It offers both a Windows GUI and a cross-platform command-line interface (Rdx) to help users find the source of an image.

вң… Detects nearby smart glasses via Bluetooth signals
вң… Warns the user of potential smart glasses presence
вң… Free and open-source
вң… No telemetry or data collection from the app itself
вң… Local log file export (user-controlled)

вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ 818 рқҳҖрқҳҒрқ—®рқ—ҝрқҳҖ
рҹҚҙ 26 рқ—ірқ—јрқ—ҝрқ—ёрқҳҖ
рҹ”Қ 13 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

This Android application, written in Kotlin, aims to detect nearby smart glasses by analyzing their Bluetooth signals and alerting the user. It focuses on privacy by not collecting user data, but warns of potential false positives and advises extreme caution in interpreting its alerts.

рҹ“… Created: Mar 2025 вҖў Updated: Feb 2026

вң… Sliding, tiling window management on an infinite strip
вң… Independent window strips per monitor
вң… No resizing of existing windows when new ones open
вң… Works with macOS workspaces and separate spaces
вң… Focus follows mouse
вң… Touchpad navigation for window sliding
вң… Optimized for large and small displays

рҹ“Ҡ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§ рқ—Ұрқ—§рқ—”рқ—§рқ—Ұ

вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ 988 рқҳҖрқҳҒрқ—®рқ—ҝрқҳҖ
рҹҚҙ 35 рқ—ірқ—јрқ—ҝрқ—ёрқҳҖ
рҹ”Қ 21 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Paneru is a sliding, tiling window manager for macOS that arranges windows on an infinite strip, ensuring existing layouts are never resized when new windows are opened. It operates independently on each monitor and is designed to optimize usability for both large and small displays.

вҖў рқ—ҡрқ—¶рқҳҒрқ—ӣрқҳӮрқ—Ҝ: https://github.com/karinushka/paneru

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

This repository contains a prank application for Windows called 'desk_troll'. Upon execution, it simulates a fake desktop by displaying a screenshot of the user's actual desktop, while animated characters (a penguin and a fly) interact with it, 'stealing' icons and making the mouse behave erratically. The application is designed to be difficult to close, requiring a specific password.

вң… Blocks AI-SEO content farms

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

OnlyHuman is a filter list for uBlock Origin designed to block AI-generated SEO spam, thin content websites, and other low-effort content from search results and feeds. It aims to improve the quality of online information by removing junk content that exploits search engines.

вҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғвҒғ

рҹ”— рқ—ҹрқ—ңрқ—Ўрқ—һрқ—Ұ

LMMS is a free, open-source, cross-platform digital audio workstation for music production. It provides a comprehensive suite of tools for composing, arranging, and mixing music, including a song editor, piano roll, beat sequencer, and mixer.
